falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish breakout, contradicting the pattern's historical behavior of consolidation after a bottom formation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds the 90th percentile of historical daily volume levels for the asset in the past year
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would suggest a blowoff top scenario, invalidating the current UNKNOWN verdict which assumes a continuation of the historical bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The MACD histogram crosses below the zero line with a bearish divergence in price
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This technical failure would indicate a reversal in momentum, directly contradicting the expected behavior of the bottom_2022_may_luna pattern which typically shows bullish divergence.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
